DP.165.0000:
That glaringly bright and cool thing
you have!\f
It’s undoubtedly a Pokétch!
They’re awesome, yeah?\f
I got OK’d by the Pokétch Company
to develop original Pokétch apps.\f
Hey, you’re a Trainer, right?
Can you do me a favor?\f
You’ve got Pokémon with different
natures, right? May I see them?
DP.165.0001:
What am I in the mood to see now...\f
I’d like to see a Pokémon with
a Serious nature.
DP.165.0002:
What am I in the mood to see now...\f
I’d like to see a Pokémon with
a Naive nature.
DP.165.0003:
What am I in the mood to see now...\f
I’d like to see a Pokémon with
a Quirky nature.
DP.165.0004:
Wow! Your [0100,0000] has
a Serious nature all right!\f
Thanks! I’ll give you this
Calendar app for your Pokétch.
DP.165.0005:
Wow! Your [0100,0000] has
a Naive nature all right!\f
Thanks! I’ll give you this
Dot Artist app for your Pokétch.
DP.165.0006:
Wow! Your [0100,0000] has
a Quirky nature all right!\f
Thanks! I’ll give you this
Roulette app for your Pokétch.
DP.165.0007:
Some day, Pokétch apps may outnumber
all the species of Pokémon.
